title: Anti-Flood Device Activated
shortDescription: Water has been detected in the base tray, activating the anti-flood safety system.
fullDescription: Error AL01 indicates the float switch in the base tray detected water leaking into the bottom of the dishwasher. The machine stops all water intake and runs the drain pump to prevent flooding. This is a safety protection feature shared across Indesit, Hotpoint, and Ariston dishwashers.

fixSteps.title: Tilt and drain
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug and turn off water. Tilt machine backward 45 degrees to drain the base tray. Have towels ready.

fixSteps.title: Inspect door seal
fixSteps.instruction: Check the door gasket for tears, deformation, or detergent buildup. Clean or replace as needed.

fixSteps.title: Check internal hoses
fixSteps.instruction: Remove side panels and inspect all hose connections at the wash pump, drain pump, and inlet valve for drips.

fixSteps.title: Inspect pump and sump
fixSteps.instruction: Check the wash pump housing and sump for cracks. Run water through the system to find the leak.

whenToCallPro: If the leak source is not obvious or involves the wash pump.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL01 anti flood leak fix

faq.q: Can I reset AL01 without fixing the leak?
faq.a: Tilting clears the error temporarily, but it returns if the leak is not repaired.

faq.q: How does the anti-flood work?
faq.a: A polystyrene float in the base tray rises when water leaks in, triggering a microswitch.

faq.q: Can too much detergent cause AL01?
faq.a: Yes, excessive suds can overflow through seals.

title: Water Intake Fault
shortDescription: The dishwasher is not filling with water within the expected time.
fullDescription: Error AL02 indicates the dishwasher has not reached the required water level within the timeout period. Usually a water supply issue rather than a machine fault.
symptoms: Cycle does not progress past fill

fixSteps.title: Check water supply
fixSteps.instruction: Verify the tap is fully open and water is flowing.

fixSteps.title: Inspect inlet hose
fixSteps.instruction: Check for kinks. Disconnect and clean the filter screen.

fixSteps.title: Test inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: Check for 230V at the valve during fill. If voltage present but no water, valve is faulty.

fixSteps.title: Replace inlet valve
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off water, disconnect hose, remove valve and install replacement.

whenToCallPro: Only if the inlet valve needs replacement.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL02 water fill error fix

faq.q: Can low pressure cause AL02?
faq.a: Yes, very low water pressure prevents timely filling.

faq.q: What is Aquastop?
faq.a: A built-in shut-off valve in the hose that closes if the hose bursts.

faq.q: How do I clean the inlet filter?
faq.a: Disconnect the hose and pull the mesh screen out with pliers. Rinse under running water.

title: Drain Timeout Error
shortDescription: The dishwasher could not drain water within the allowed time.
fullDescription: Error AL03 indicates the drain cycle did not complete in time. Water remains in the sump. Typically caused by blockages in the drain system or a failed drain pump.

causes.cause: Drain filter clogged with food debris

symptoms: Drain pump sounds strained or silent

fixSteps.title: Clean drain filter
fixSteps.instruction: Remove filter assembly from the bottom and clean thoroughly under running water.

fixSteps.title: Check drain hose
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect for kinks and blockages. Ensure proper high loop routing.

fixSteps.title: Inspect drain pump
fixSteps.instruction: Remove filter housing cover and check the impeller for obstructions.

fixSteps.title: Replace drain pump
fixSteps.instruction: If pump does not run, test electrically and replace if failed.

whenToCallPro: If the drain pump has failed.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL03 drain blocked fix

faq.q: How often should I clean the filter?
faq.a: After every 3-5 cycles for the coarse filter, weekly for the fine mesh.

faq.q: Can the sink drain cause AL03?
faq.a: Yes, a blocked sink waste can prevent dishwasher drainage.

faq.q: Why does the drain hose need a high loop?
faq.a: To prevent dirty water siphoning back into the machine.

title: NTC Temperature Sensor Fault
shortDescription: The water temperature sensor is out of range or disconnected.
fullDescription: Error AL04 indicates the NTC thermistor has failed or is reading outside its expected range. The dishwasher cannot properly control wash and rinse temperatures without a valid reading.
symptoms: Cycle runs much longer than normal

fixSteps.title: Reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 10 minutes and retry.

fixSteps.title: Test NTC sensor
fixSteps.instruction: Locate the NTC in the sump area. Disconnect and measure resistance (10K-50K ohms at room temp).

fixSteps.title: Check wiring
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect wiring from NTC to control board for damage.

fixSteps.title: Replace NTC
fixSteps.instruction: Pull old sensor from housing, insert new one, reconnect.

whenToCallPro: Only if NTC and wiring test fine, suggesting a board fault.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL04 temperature sensor fix

faq.q: What temperature should the dishwasher reach?
faq.a: Normal wash 55-65°C, intensive up to 70°C, eco around 45-50°C.

faq.q: Can a faulty NTC damage dishes?
faq.a: Overheating can damage plastics. No heating means poor cleaning.

faq.q: Is the sensor easy to find?
faq.a: It is typically in the sump area at the bottom of the machine, near the heater.

title: Circulation Pump / Pressure Switch Fault
shortDescription: The wash pump or water level sensor is not functioning correctly.
fullDescription: Error AL05 indicates the circulation pump is not running or the pressure switch cannot detect the correct water level. The circulation pump drives water through the spray arms for cleaning.
symptoms: Machine fills and drains but does not wash

fixSteps.title: Check spray arms
fixSteps.instruction: Remove and check spray arms spin freely. Clear debris from spray holes.

fixSteps.title: Inspect circulation pump
fixSteps.instruction: Access from underneath. Check for debris jamming the impeller.

fixSteps.title: Test pump electrically
fixSteps.instruction: Check motor continuity (3-15 ohms). Test start capacitor if present.

fixSteps.title: Replace pump
fixSteps.instruction: If motor failed, disconnect and replace the circulation pump assembly.

whenToCallPro: Circulation pump replacement involves significant disassembly.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL05 wash pump error fix

faq.q: What does the circulation pump do?
faq.a: Forces water at high pressure through the spray arms to clean dishes.

faq.q: Can broken items cause AL05?
faq.a: Yes, glass fragments can jam the impeller.

faq.q: Is this the same as the drain pump?
faq.a: No, they are separate. The circulation pump is larger.

title: Water Inlet Valve Stuck Open
shortDescription: The inlet valve is not closing properly, causing overfilling.
fullDescription: Error AL06 indicates the water inlet valve is stuck open or the control board cannot close it. This can cause continuous water flow and potential flooding.

fixSteps.title: Turn off water immediately
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off the water supply tap. Unplug the machine.

fixSteps.title: Clean the valve
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect inlet hose and clean the valve seat and filter screen.

fixSteps.title: Test the valve
fixSteps.instruction: Measure solenoid resistance (2K-4K ohms). Check if valve leaks with no power applied.

fixSteps.title: Replace valve
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off water, disconnect hose and electrical connector, swap valve.

whenToCallPro: If the valve is fine, the control board triac may need replacement.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL06 inlet valve stuck fix

faq.q: Can AL06 cause flooding?
faq.a: Yes, turn off the water tap immediately.

faq.q: Should I leave the tap on when not in use?
faq.a: Good practice to turn it off, especially on older machines.

faq.q: What causes the valve to stick?
faq.a: Mineral deposits, grit, or diaphragm wear.

title: Heating Element Fault
shortDescription: The wash water heating element is not working or has a short circuit.
fullDescription: Error AL08 indicates the heating element has failed — either open circuit, shorted to ground, or the control board cannot power it. Hot water is essential for effective dishwashing.

fixSteps.title: Reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 10 minutes and retry.

fixSteps.title: Test heater
fixSteps.instruction: Disconnect terminals and measure resistance (15-30 ohms). Check insulation (over 2 megaohms).

fixSteps.title: Check connections
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect heater terminals for corrosion or heat damage.

fixSteps.title: Replace heater
fixSteps.instruction: Drain water, disconnect old element, install replacement.

whenToCallPro: If the heater is leaking to earth and tripping the RCD.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL08 heater element replacement

faq.q: Can I wash with cold water?
faq.a: The machine will run but cleaning will be very poor.

faq.q: Why does my RCD trip?
faq.a: A heater leaking electricity to ground trips the safety switch.

faq.q: Is the heater in the sump?
faq.a: On some newer models, yes, requiring sump replacement.

title: EEPROM / Software Error
shortDescription: The control board EEPROM memory has corrupted data.
fullDescription: Error AL09 indicates the EEPROM chip has a data corruption or communication error. Cycle programs and configuration data may be lost.

causes.cause: EEPROM data corruption from power interruption

fixSteps.title: Extended power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 30 minutes for full reset.

fixSteps.title: Check connectors
fixSteps.instruction: Reseat all board connectors firmly.

fixSteps.title: EEPROM reprogramming
fixSteps.instruction: A service technician can reprogram with the correct firmware.

fixSteps.title: Replace control board
fixSteps.instruction: If reprogramming fails, replace with pre-programmed board.

whenToCallPro: EEPROM faults almost always require professional intervention.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL09 EEPROM control board fix

faq.q: What causes corruption?
faq.a: Power cuts during write operations, voltage spikes, and aging.

faq.q: Is it worth repairing?
faq.a: A board at 70-160 is worthwhile if the machine is under 8-10 years old.

faq.q: Can I buy boards online?
faq.a: Yes, ensure you get the exact part number for your model.

title: Heater Circuit / Relay Error
shortDescription: The heater relay on the control board is stuck or damaged.
fullDescription: Error AL10 indicates the control board cannot properly manage the heating element relay. The relay may be welded shut (overheating) or open (no heat). This is a board-level fault.

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Unplug for 10 minutes and retry.

fixSteps.title: Test heater
fixSteps.instruction: Check resistance and insulation. Replace if faulty.

fixSteps.title: Inspect board relay
fixSteps.instruction: Look for burnt relay, discolored PCB, or melted components.

fixSteps.title: Replace control board
fixSteps.instruction: Replace board and heater if both are faulty.

whenToCallPro: AL10 involves the heater safety circuit. Professional repair recommended.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL10 heater relay fix

faq.q: Is AL10 the same as AL08?
faq.a: No. AL08 is heater failure. AL10 is the control board relay circuit failure.

faq.q: Can I replace just the relay?
faq.a: Possible with skilled soldering, but full board replacement is standard.

faq.q: What causes relay failure?
faq.a: Aging, heater short circuits, and power spikes.

title: Wash Motor / Diverter Fault
shortDescription: The wash motor or spray arm diverter is not functioning correctly.
fullDescription: Error AL07 indicates the motor driving the spray arms or the diverter valve alternating water between upper and lower arms has failed. This results in poor or no cleaning.
symptoms: Only top or bottom rack cleaned

fixSteps.title: Check spray arms
fixSteps.instruction: Remove spray arms and ensure they spin freely. Clear blocked holes.

fixSteps.title: Inspect diverter
fixSteps.instruction: Check the diverter at the sump for food debris. Clean thoroughly.

fixSteps.title: Test diverter motor
fixSteps.instruction: Measure resistance (200-800 ohms) and check for voltage during operation.

fixSteps.title: Replace diverter
fixSteps.instruction: Remove sump cover, disconnect old unit, install replacement.

whenToCallPro: If the main wash pump motor has failed.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL07 diverter spray arm fix

faq.q: What is the diverter?
faq.a: It alternates water flow between upper and lower spray arms.

faq.q: Can overloading cause AL07?
faq.a: Yes, items blocking spray arms can overload the motor.

faq.q: Why is only one rack clean?
faq.a: The diverter may be stuck directing water to one arm only.

title: Communication Error Between Boards
shortDescription: The display module and main control board cannot communicate.
fullDescription: Error AL12 indicates a communication breakdown between the user interface and main control board, typically caused by a loose cable, faulty display, or main board failure.

fixSteps.title: Reseat cable
fixSteps.instruction: Open door panel and reseat the cable between display and main board.

fixSteps.title: Check for moisture
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect for corrosion or condensation on boards. Clean with electronics cleaner.

fixSteps.title: Power cycle
fixSteps.instruction: After reseating, power cycle the machine.

fixSteps.title: Replace display board
fixSteps.instruction: Start with the less expensive display board.

whenToCallPro: If reseating does not fix it and you are unsure which board failed.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL12 communication error fix

faq.q: Can steam cause AL12?
faq.a: Yes, steam corrodes board connectors over time.

faq.q: Which board to replace first?
faq.a: Start with the cable, then display board, then main board.

faq.q: How to prevent AL12?
faq.a: Keep the door seal in good condition. Avoid opening mid-cycle when very hot.

title: Rinse Aid Dispenser Fault
shortDescription: The rinse aid dispenser mechanism is not operating correctly.
fullDescription: Error AL13 indicates the rinse aid dispenser motor or solenoid is not functioning. Rinse aid helps water sheet off dishes for better drying. Without it, dishes may have water spots and streaks.
symptoms: Rinse aid not dispensed during cycle

fixSteps.title: Clean the dispenser
fixSteps.instruction: Open the rinse aid compartment and clean any dried residue. Run hot water through the compartment.

fixSteps.title: Check dispenser mechanism
fixSteps.instruction: Remove the door inner panel to access the dispenser. Check the solenoid or motor moves freely.

fixSteps.title: Test electrically
fixSteps.instruction: Measure solenoid resistance and check for voltage during the rinse phase.

fixSteps.title: Replace dispenser assembly
fixSteps.instruction: Remove the faulty dispenser unit and install replacement.

whenToCallPro: If the dispenser and solenoid test fine but rinse aid is not dispensed.
videoSearchQuery: Indesit dishwasher AL13 rinse aid dispenser fix

faq.q: Can I wash without rinse aid?
faq.a: Yes, but dishes will have water spots and drying will be less effective.

faq.q: Is rinse aid necessary?
faq.a: It significantly improves drying and prevents water spots, especially on glassware.

faq.q: Can I use vinegar instead of rinse aid?
faq.a: Vinegar can work as a substitute but may damage rubber seals over time. Commercial rinse aid is recommended.
